title: Damapana japonica
taxonomy: Damapana japonica is a species of plant in the family Rubiaceae. It belongs to the genus Damapana. The classification of Damapana japonica places it within the order Gentianales. This order includes various flowering plant families. The classification of Damapana japonica is based on its morphological and genetic characteristics.
uses: Damapana japonica is known for its potential medicinal uses, including its possible anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties.
